# CareSync HIMS

> AI-powered Hospital Management System: unified EMR, OP/IP, pharmacy, lab, billing and analytics for modern healthcare facilities.

CareSync HIMS helps hospitals run clinical, operational and financial workflows on a single platform with role-based access for doctors, nurses, pharmacists, lab technicians, receptionists and administrators.

## Pages

- [Hospital landing](/hospital): Product overview, features, pricing and FAQ.
- [Hospital login](/hospital/login): Sign in to an existing hospital account.
- [Hospital signup](/hospital/signup): Register a new hospital and create an admin account.
- [Forgot password](/hospital/forgot-password): Reset your hospital account password.
